afterSnapshot.name: getDirections

200.description: Direction analysis with scores and ratings for 8 headings

schema.summary: Analyze sailing conditions in 8 compass directions

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: API endpoint for the compass rose direction analysis. Provides scored and rated headings for the UI.
implementation: Extracts lat/lon from query params, validates them, then delegates to analyzeDirections function. Returns 8 direction scores with color ratings and text summaries.
